messages.content: You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the time reference as JSON with keys: when, time_type, precision. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
It was during the monsoon, the year the big landslide came down near the school. Everything was muddy for weeks.
{"when": "monsoon season, year of the big landslide", "time_type": "season + landmark event", "precision": "approximate"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the time reference as JSON with keys: when, time_type, precision. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
I was eight years old when my grandfather died. I remember because I had just started school that same year.
{"when": "age eight, first year of school", "time_type": "age + life milestone", "precision": "approximate"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the time reference as JSON with keys: when, time_type, precision. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
It happened the night before Tihar. We had already lit the first diyas and the whole house smelled of oil.
{"when": "night before Tihar", "time_type": "festival eve", "precision": "exact within festival calendar"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the time reference as JSON with keys: when, time_type, precision. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
My eldest son was born in 2034 BS. I remember because there was a big election that year and everyone was arguing about politics.
{"when": "2034 BS", "time_type": "Bikram Sambat year", "precision": "exact"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the time reference as JSON with keys: when, time_type, precision. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
We moved to Kathmandu in the dry season, before the wheat was harvested. The roads were dusty the whole way.
{"when": "dry season, pre-wheat harvest", "time_type": "season + agricultural marker", "precision": "approximate"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the time reference as JSON with keys: when, time_type, precision. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
It was during Dashain, on the day of tika, when my father placed his hand on my head for the last time before he passed that winter.
{"when": "Dashain tika day", "time_type": "specific festival day", "precision": "exact within festival calendar"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the time reference as JSON with keys: when, time_type, precision. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
I must have been around thirteen or fourteen. Old enough to carry water from the river but not yet old enough to go to the market alone.
{"when": "approximately age 13–14", "time_type": "age range with life-stage marker", "precision": "approximate"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the time reference as JSON with keys: when, time_type, precision. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
It was the year of the great earthquake. Everything changed after that — the village, the people, the way we thought about things.
{"when": "year of the great earthquake", "time_type": "landmark disaster event", "precision": "approximate, requires cross-reference"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the time reference as JSON with keys: when, time_type, precision. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
Every winter, when the cold came down from the mountains, my grandmother would start making ghee. That was the signal that the cold months had truly arrived.
{"when": "winter, onset of cold season", "time_type": "season + recurring ritual marker", "precision": "recurring, not a single year"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the time reference as JSON with keys: when, time_type, precision. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
The morning of my wedding. I was twenty-two. My hands were shaking even before the ceremony began.
{"when": "wedding day, age twenty-two", "time_type": "life milestone + age", "precision": "exact life event"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the time reference as JSON with keys: when, time_type, precision. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
It was deep in the monsoon, the middle of Shrawan. The river had swollen and you could hear it from our house all night.
{"when": "Shrawan, peak monsoon", "time_type": "Nepali month + season", "precision": "exact month"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the time reference as JSON with keys: when, time_type, precision. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
I was very young, maybe five or six. I only know it was before my brother was born because I was still the smallest in the house.
{"when": "before younger brother's birth, approximately age 5–6", "time_type": "age range + family milestone", "precision": "approximate"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the time reference as JSON with keys: when, time_type, precision. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
It was on Maghesankranti, the cold festival. We had just taken a bath in the river at dawn and our skin was still stinging from the cold water.
{"when": "Maghesankranti", "time_type": "specific festival", "precision": "exact festival day"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the time reference as JSON with keys: when, time_type, precision. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
After my father died, I don't remember exactly what year, but the mango trees in the yard were full of fruit. So it must have been early summer.
{"when": "early summer, year of father's death", "time_type": "season + family event", "precision": "seasonal, year unknown"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the time reference as JSON with keys: when, time_type, precision. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
We left the village three days after Bhaitika. My brother had just received his tika and the ink was barely dry when we had to pack our things.
{"when": "three days after Bhaitika", "time_type": "days after festival", "precision": "exact relative to festival"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the time reference as JSON with keys: when, time_type, precision. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
It was in the time of the panchayat. Everything was different then — you could not speak freely, not even in your own home.
{"when": "panchayat era", "time_type": "historical political period", "precision": "era-level, not a specific year"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the time reference as JSON with keys: when, time_type, precision. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
My daughter was born on a Thursday morning, the same day as Brihaspati puja. We thought it was a very auspicious sign.
{"when": "Thursday, day of Brihaspati puja", "time_type": "day of week + religious observance", "precision": "day-level, year unknown"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the time reference as JSON with keys: when, time_type, precision. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
I had just finished my SLC exam. I was sitting under the neem tree waiting for the results when the news came about my uncle.
{"when": "post-SLC exam period, results waiting period", "time_type": "life milestone + waiting period", "precision": "approximate, academic calendar"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the time reference as JSON with keys: when, time_type, precision. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
It was the last day of the year, Chaite Dashain time. The fields were turning yellow and everyone was getting ready for the new year.
{"when": "Chaitra, end of Nepali year", "time_type": "Nepali month + end-of-year period", "precision": "exact month"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the time reference as JSON with keys: when, time_type, precision. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
When I was pregnant with my third child, that whole summer was unbearably hot. Even the crows were panting.
{"when": "summer during third pregnancy", "time_type": "season + family milestone", "precision": "approximate"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the time reference as JSON with keys: when, time_type, precision. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
It must have been 1990, or close to it. The political changes were just happening. People were marching in the streets of Kathmandu.
{"when": "approximately 1990 AD, Jana Andolan period", "time_type": "approximate AD year + historical event", "precision": "approximate"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the time reference as JSON with keys: when, time_type, precision. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
On the first day of Baisakh, every single year, my mother-in-law would wake before dawn and wash the whole courtyard herself. It was never negotiable.
{"when": "first day of Baisakh (Nepali New Year)", "time_type": "specific festival day, recurring annually", "precision": "exact day, recurring"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the time reference as JSON with keys: when, time_type, precision. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
I was maybe thirty, not yet thirty-five. My children were all still small and we had not yet bought land.
{"when": "approximately age 30–35", "time_type": "age range + life-stage marker", "precision": "approximate"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the time reference as JSON with keys: when, time_type, precision. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
The flood came in the middle of Ashadh. The rice seedlings had just been planted and most of them were lost.
{"when": "mid-Ashadh, early monsoon planting season", "time_type": "Nepali month + agricultural phase", "precision": "exact month"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the time reference as JSON with keys: when, time_type, precision. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
It was after the war, that is all I know. My husband came back very thin and it took years before he was himself again.
{"when": "post-war period", "time_type": "historical period marker", "precision": "era-level, no specific year"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the time reference as JSON with keys: when, time_type, precision. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
During the Indra Jatra, on the day they pull the chariot through the streets, I got separated from my mother in the crowd. I was terrified.
{"when": "Indra Jatra, chariot-pulling day", "time_type": "specific festival day", "precision": "exact within festival calendar"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the time reference as JSON with keys: when, time_type, precision. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
After my mother-in-law died — it was in Mangsir, when the cold was just beginning — the whole rhythm of the house changed.
{"when": "Mangsir, early winter", "time_type": "Nepali month + season onset", "precision": "exact month"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the time reference as JSON with keys: when, time_type, precision. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
I had not yet had my bratabandha. So I could not have been more than ten or eleven years old.
{"when": "before bratabandha ceremony, approximately under age 11", "time_type": "pre-ritual milestone, age upper bound", "precision": "approximate upper bound"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the time reference as JSON with keys: when, time_type, precision. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
It was a full moon night, I know that much. The whole path back from the temple was bright as day without any lamp.
{"when": "purnima, full moon night", "time_type": "lunar calendar marker", "precision": "lunar day, month and year unknown"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the time reference as JSON with keys: when, time_type, precision. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
The first time I ever went to Kathmandu, I was sixteen. It was during school holidays, after the Dashain break.
{"when": "post-Dashain school break, age sixteen", "time_type": "festival break period + age", "precision": "approximate"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the time reference as JSON with keys: when, time_type, precision. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
It was harvest time, Kartik I think, when we finally finished paying off the debt. My father smiled for the first time in two years.
{"when": "Kartik, harvest season", "time_type": "Nepali month + agricultural phase", "precision": "exact month"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the time reference as JSON with keys: when, time_type, precision. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
I was just a baby, so I don't remember it myself. My mother told me it was the year of the big drought, when even the wells ran low.
{"when": "year of the big drought, infancy of speaker", "time_type": "landmark natural event, secondhand memory", "precision": "approximate, not personally remembered"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the time reference as JSON with keys: when, time_type, precision. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
On the evening of Laxmi Puja during Tihar, when every house was covered in lights, my sister told me she was going to get married. I was so surprised I dropped my diya.
{"when": "Laxmi Puja evening, Tihar", "time_type": "specific festival evening", "precision": "exact within festival calendar"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the time reference as JSON with keys: when, time_type, precision. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
We came back from India in the spring, when the rhododendrons were all blooming red on the hillside. I had been gone almost three years.
{"when": "spring, rhododendron blooming season, after three years away", "time_type": "season + natural marker + elapsed duration", "precision": "seasonal, year approximate"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the time reference as JSON with keys: when, time_type, precision. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
My youngest was still nursing, so I must have been around twenty-six or twenty-seven. It was the coldest winter I can remember.
{"when": "coldest remembered winter, approximately age 26–27", "time_type": "season intensity + age + family milestone", "precision": "approximate"}
